maps.pageDescription: All maps ranked by minutes played
maps.pageIntro: Fortnite UEFN maps built by Kaio, ranked by total minutes played. Competitive practice modes, casual tycoons, and brand activations — collectively generating over 4.8 billion minutes of gameplay across collaborations with Martoz, GamersOrigin, and WZF.

services.title: Fortnite Map Development Services
services.subtitle: From concept to published island. Professional UEFN development backed by {minutes} of proven gameplay and {collabs} major collaborations.
services.competitiveDesc: Zone wars, boxfights, realistics, and ranked systems built for the competitive community. Our Martoz collaboration maps have generated over 4.3 billion minutes of gameplay, proving we understand what competitive players want.
services.tycoonDesc: Full progression systems, economy design, and engaging casual gameplay loops. Our Carlife Tycoon averages 81 minutes per session — exceptional retention driven by deep progression mechanics and rewarding gameplay loops.
services.customDesc: FFA arenas, endgame cups, deathrun, parkour, and boss battles. From WZF's Pro Endgame Cups to GamersOrigin's Senses Rush, we've built diverse game modes that each find and serve their audience.
services.verseDesc: Custom devices, scoring systems, loadout managers, UI systems, and performance optimization. Verse is UEFN's programming language, and we've used it to build frameworks like CLUTCH and FFA that power multiple maps.
services.step1: Briefing — We discuss your vision, target audience, and technical requirements.
services.step2: Prototyping — A playable prototype within 1-2 weeks for early feedback and iteration.
services.step3: Development — Full build with Verse scripting, polish, optimization, and testing across all platforms.
services.step4: Publishing & Support — We handle submission, moderation, launch strategy, and ongoing updates.
services.faq1q: What is a UEFN map developer?
services.faq1a: A UEFN (Unreal Editor for Fortnite) map developer creates custom Fortnite experiences using Epic Games' professional development tools. Unlike basic Fortnite Creative, UEFN provides access to Unreal Engine 5 features, Verse scripting, and custom assets — enabling professional-quality game modes that rival Epic's own content.
services.faq2q: How much does it cost to hire a Fortnite map developer?
services.faq2a: Pricing varies based on complexity, scope, and timeline. Simple maps start in the low thousands, while complex competitive modes or brand activations with custom Verse scripting can range significantly higher. Contact us for a custom quote based on your specific requirements.
services.faq3q: How long does it take to build a UEFN map?
services.faq3a: A simple map can be built in 2-4 weeks. Complex competitive modes with custom Verse scripting, ranked systems, and multiple scenarios typically take 6-12 weeks. Brand activations with unique mechanics may take 8-16 weeks depending on scope.
services.faq4q: Can you update and maintain my existing map?
services.faq4a: Yes. Many of our maps are on version 100+, with our flagship Clutch Realistics at version 241. We offer ongoing maintenance to keep loadouts updated with the current Fortnite meta, fix bugs, add features, and optimize performance.
services.faq5q: What is Verse scripting in UEFN?
services.faq5a: Verse is Epic Games' programming language designed for UEFN. It allows developers to create custom gameplay mechanics, UI systems, scoring, matchmaking logic, and devices that go beyond what's possible with Creative's built-in tools. Think of it as the difference between using a website builder and writing custom code.
services.faq6q: How do Fortnite Creative maps make money?
services.faq6a: Through Epic's engagement-based payout system. The more minutes players spend on your island, the larger your share of Epic's monthly creator fund (drawn from Fortnite revenue). Top islands generate significant monthly income. Our portfolio has accumulated 4.8B+ minutes played.

about.title: Who is Kaio
about.bioExtended: With over 4.8 billion minutes of gameplay created, Kaio has established a track record of building Fortnite experiences that players return to daily. The focus on competitive game modes — boxfights, realistics, zone wars — has led to collaborations with some of the biggest names in the Fortnite competitive scene.
